prompt: Generate a realistic street scene image overlaid with computer graphics demonstrating object detection. The image should feature bounding boxes and text labels highlighting vehicles and traffic infrastructure, mimicking the style of a real-time detection system output on a busy road.
prompt_refined:
Generate a new image based on image 1, depicting a realistic daytime street scene at a busy intersection under a clear blue sky. Overlay the scene with computer graphics that perfectly mimic a real-time object detection system's output. The overlay should feature:
- Green bounding boxes with white text labels reading 'truck' around the trucks, specifically the large truck on the middle-right and the smaller truck in the middle-left lanes.
- Yellow bounding boxes with white text labels reading 'car' around the white car on the far left and the silver station wagon on the far right.
- Blue text labels reading 'traffic light' in the upper-left corner and near the center-right traffic pole.
Ensure the bounding boxes and text labels appear as a distinct, digitally rendered overlay on the realistic street scene, consistent with a live computer vision display.
objects: realistic daytime street scene at a busy intersection
smaller truck in the middle-left lanes
white car on the far left
silver station wagon on the far right
green bounding boxes with white text labels 'truck'
yellow bounding boxes with white text labels 'car'
blue text label 'traffic light' in the upper-left corner
blue text label 'traffic light' near the center-right traffic pole
